zh.lifeSummary: 當David De Calveley於1325年出生在英國爾麗婭 白 南特維其時，他的父親David Calveley20歲，母親Johanna de Nantwich20歲。他和Agnes de Mottram至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1374年在英國爾莫特拉姆享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Calveley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Calverley
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When David De Calveley was born in 1325, in Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, his father, David Calveley, was 20 and his mother, Johanna de Nantwich, was 20. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes de Mottram. He died in 1374, in Mottram, Cheshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David De Calveley est né en 1325, à Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, David Calveley, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Johanna de Nantwich, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes de Mottram. Il est décédé en 1374, à Mottram, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David De Calveley 1325 in Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Calveley 20 und seine Mutter Johanna de Nantwich 20. Er hatte mit Agnes de Mottram mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1374 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Mottram, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David De Calveley è nato il nel 1325 nel Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, David Calveley, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Johanna de Nantwich, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes de Mottram. Morì nel 1374, nel Mottram, Cheshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David De Calveleyが1325年にイギリスチェシュアイアレア ビー ナントウィチで生まれた時，父David Calveleyは20歳，母Johanna de Nantwichは20歳であった。彼はAgnes de Mottramとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1374年にイギリスチェシュアイアモットラムで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David De Calveley(이)가 1325년 영국 체실르 리아 비 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Calveley(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna de Nantwich(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Agnes de Mottram(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1374년 영국 체실르 모트램에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David De Calveley nasceu em 1325, em Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, David Calveley, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Johanna de Nantwich, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes de Mottram. Ele faleceu em 1374, em Mottram, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David De Calveley родился в 1325 г. в местности леа би нантвич, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени David Calveley было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna de Nantwich, 20. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Agnes de Mottram. Он умер в 1374 г. в местности моттрам, чешир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David De Calveley nació en 1325, en Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, David Calveley, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Johanna de Nantwich, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes de Mottram. Murió en 1374, en Mottram, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
